PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?member ?memberLabel WHERE {
  ?member p:P39 ?position .
  ?position ps:P39 wd:Q21971205 ; pq:P580 ?start .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?position pq:P582 ?end
  }
  FILTER(?start <= "2020-12-31" ^^ xsd:date &&(! BOUND(?end) || ?end >= "2018-01-01" ^^ xsd:date))
  ?member wdt:P742 ?lastName .
  ?member wdt:P735 ?firstName .
  ?position pq:P768 / wdt:P131 * wd:Q951659 .
  ?member rdfs:label ?memberLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?memberLabel) = "en")
}
ORDER BY ?memberLabel
